archetype: Organic & Earthy mixed with Jewel & Luxury (Premium B2B Ocean/Earth)

rules.h1: text-4xl sm:text-5xl lg:text-6xl tracking-tight leading-none text-text_primary font-serif
rules.h2: text-2xl sm:text-3xl lg:text-4xl tracking-tight leading-tight text-text_primary font-serif

spacing_and_rhythm.general: Generous spacing. p-8 to p-24 for section paddings.
spacing_and_rhythm.containers: Use max-w-7xl mx-auto for main content limits. Grid layouts must have wide gaps (gap-8 to gap-12).
spacing_and_rhythm.grid_bento: Asymmetric grids for marketing sections (e.g., col-span-8 and col-span-4).
spacing_and_rhythm.grid_technical: Dense, precise 1px borders (border-collapse) for data panels.

motion_specs.hover_states: transition-all duration-300 ease-out. Slight lift (-translate-y-1) for cards. Text color shifts to a brighter tint on hover.
motion_specs.page_load: Staggered fade-ins (opacity-0 to opacity-100, translate-y-4 to translate-y-0) for hero and grid items.
motion_specs.charts: Recharts default animations allowed, ensure smooth tooltips.

component_patterns.navbar: Sticky top (z-50). Crystal Glassmorphism: backdrop-blur-xl bg-[#050B14]/70 border-b border-white/10. Mega-menu for product families.
component_patterns.hero: Full height or min-h-[80vh]. Background image with bg-[#050B14]/60 overlay. High contrast serif typography. Left aligned content.
component_patterns.product_cards: Grid Borders (Technical Look). 1px border border-white/10. Flat background. Hover: slight lift, border color shifts to primary_brand (#2E5C42).
component_patterns.technical_spec_panels: Certificate style. Use monospace font for data. border-collapse, alternating row backgrounds (bg-white/5), rigorous alignment.
component_patterns.comparison_tables: Shadcn Table component. Clean 1px borders, sticky headers if scrollable, monochrome palette for data rows with primary color highlighting the 'Superior' traits.
component_patterns.timeline: Manufacturing Process. Vertical line with staggered alternating nodes. Nodes have glowing dots (ring-4 ring-primary_brand/30 bg-primary_brand).
component_patterns.charts: Recharts. Bar and Donut charts. Use #2E5C42 (Kelp), #1A365D (Ocean), #8B5A2B (Earth), and #D4AF37 (Premium) for data series. Minimal grid lines (stroke #1E293B).
component_patterns.testimonials: Editorial bento grid. Use large quote marks in serif font. Author details in monospace or clean sans.
component_patterns.faq: Shadcn Accordion. Minimalist. 1px bottom border per item. Plus/minus icon animations.
component_patterns.contact: Solid background container. Large typography for email (McLir@Sea-Weed.DE). Clean text links. Address cleanly formatted.

specific_guidance.liquid_bottle_styling: To make the bottle feel premium and clearer: Use a dark container (bg-gradient-to-br from-[#0A1628] to-[#050B14]). Add an inner glow (shadow-[inset_0_0_40px_rgba(46,92,66,0.15)]). If using a 2D image, wrap it in a container with a subtle glass effect (backdrop-blur-md) and a 1px border of white/10. Typography around the product must be high-end serif.
specific_guidance.granulate_styling: To make granulate feel natural and appealing: Use warm earthy backgrounds (bg-[#1A1412] or deep umber). Add a subtle noise/grain texture overlay (using CSS mix-blend-mode or a noise SVG pattern) to the section to evoke physical soil/particles. Use soft-rounded or pill-shaped containers for product stats to offset the harshness.

imagery_direction.general: Cinematic, deep shadows, professional agricultural corporate photography. Atlantic ocean, kelp forests, healthy livestock, sterile labs, and stainless steel factory.
imagery_direction.hero_and_ocean: Use dark, dramatic ocean/kelp imagery. Max overlay bg-black/50.
imagery_direction.livestock: Healthy dairy cows on pasture, natural lighting.
imagery_direction.lab_and_factory: Clean, technical, cool-toned lighting to contrast with organic elements.

ocean_kelp_1.description: Rocky beach with seaweed, good for raw material context

ocean_kelp_2.description: Bird flying over sea, good for hero/atmospheric background

cows_pasture_1.description: Cows resting in a field, healthy livestock

cows_pasture_2.description: Herd of cattle in dry grass, good for showing agriculture application

instructions_to_main_agent: Strictly use the defined color palette to maintain the dark, moody, premium oceanic aesthetic. DO NOT USE PURPLE OR VIOLET.
Implement React Router for all requested pages (Home, Liquid Seaweed Products, Granulates, Animal Feeding, Process, Insights, Contact).
Use standard HTML tags and Tailwind for layout and grid structure, saving Shadcn components for complex interactive pieces (Accordion, Tables).
Include 'data-testid' on every button, link, and interactive widget to ensure automated testing support.
Make the Liquid Bottle Product showcase distinct using the inner shadow/glow CSS rules specified in specific_guidance.
Make the Granulate Product showcase distinct using the warm earth background and noise overlay rules specified in specific_guidance.
Use Recharts for Market Insights section. Ensure it looks clean on dark mode, using minimal gridlines and brand colors.
The typography must feel editorial and natural: use 'Cormorant Garamond' (serif) for headings and 'Manrope' (sans) for body text.
